title: Golden Bananas
description: Makes Golden Apples look like Bananas.
body:
- This resource pack **makes Golden Apples look like Bananas**
- This also applies to **Enchanted Golden Apples**

**Disclaimer:**
- This does NOT change their display name
- Apples still look the same
- If you load the correct Minecraft version, but Minecraft says the pack is of an older version, it should still work fine
